calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2004 Continued To Apr-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:

This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, CSR: Ron Sinclair, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. For Plaintiff: TPM Properties, LLC, the Property Manager also present, was sworn & examined.
Exhibits:
1- Three day notice
2- Rental Agreement
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: TPM Properties, LLC. and against the defendant: Michael Brae
Forfeiture of the lease agreement and restitution and possession of the premises located at: 938 Geary Street apt. #401, San Francisco, CA
Principal/Damages of $5,890.40
No attorney fees and costs per costs bill.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2004 Continued To Apr-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2004 Off Calendar
